description: Every metric the Orbit stack emits, grouped by domain. Use the component dashboards for focused views.

panels.description: HTTP server request latency (autoinstrumentation).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.title: http_server_request_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.title: gkg_etl_permits_active

panels.description: Total bytes that the archive extractor refused to write to disk, summed from the tar header sizes of skipped entries. Same `reason` labels as `gkg.indexer.code.archive.entries.skipped`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_archive_bytes_skipped_bytes_total — rate/s

panels.description: Tar archive entries dropped before extraction so they never touch disk. Reasons: `excluded_extension` (basename matches the binary-asset / media / archive denylist in `code-graph::v2::config::filter::EXCLUDED_INDEXING_GLOBS`), `oversize` (declared size exceeds the configured per-file ceiling), `binary` (a NUL byte in the first 8000 bytes, git-style, with a UTF BOM rescue).
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_archive_entries_skipped_total — rate/s

panels.description: Task-level code indexing failures by pipeline stage. Increments only when a code indexing task ends with a fatal pipeline error (sink write, thread pool, sentinel spawn, internal panic). Per-file failures land in `gkg.indexer.code.file_faults` instead, so this rate is suitable for alerting.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_errors_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total push events processed by the code indexing handler.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_events_processed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Per-file CPU time in each bounded parse sub-phase (the phases the per-file CPU budgets bound). One observation per successfully-parsed file. Labels: language, phase (parse, walk, ssa). Aborted files appear in `files.skipped{reason=timeout_*}` instead, so this measures the surviving-file distribution used to size the budgets.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, language, phase) (rate(gkg_indexer_code_file_phase_cpu_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, language, phase) (rate(gkg_indexer_code_file_phase_cpu_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, language, phase) (rate(gkg_indexer_code_file_phase_cpu_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-indexer", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_file_phase_cpu_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: Per-file CPU time in each bounded parse sub-phase (the phases the per-file CPU budgets bound). One observation per successfully-parsed file. Labels: language, phase (parse, walk, ssa). Aborted files appear in `files.skipped{reason=timeout_*}` instead, so this measures the surviving-file distribution used to size the budgets.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_file_phase_cpu_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: Per-file failures during code indexing, by kind. The task itself completes successfully; individual files were excluded from the graph. Kinds: `file_read`, `invalid_utf8`, `syntax_error`, `oxc_panic`, `oxc_semantic`, `analyzer_panic`, `unknown_source_type`, `embedded_script_parse`, `rust_workspace_missing`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_file_faults_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total files seen by the code-graph indexer.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_files_processed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Source files skipped by the code-graph indexer for policy or watchdog reasons. Not an error. Reasons: `oversize`, `oversize_combined`, `line_too_long`, `minified`, `not_utf8`, `non_regular_file`, `unsafe_path`, and per-phase CPU-budget timeouts `timeout_parse`, `timeout_walk`, `timeout_ssa`, `timeout_sentinel`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_files_skipped_total — rate/s

panels.description: Webserver readiness gate state; 1 indicates the active state per `state` label.
panels.title: gkg_webserver_schema_state

panels.description: Billing events confirmed handed over to the Snowplow collector (HTTP 2xx), reported by the emitter's on_success callback. Unlike `emitted` (which counts enqueues), this counts events that actually reached the collector after retries.
panels.title: gkg_billing_events_delivered_total — rate/s

panels.description: Billing events permanently dropped by the emitter without reaching the collector, reported by the on_failure callback: a non-retriable status, exhausted retries, auth failure, or an unknown future variant.
panels.title: gkg_billing_events_delivery_failed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Billing events not emitted because event construction failed (realm missing, realm unrecognized, or builder error).
panels.title: gkg_billing_events_dropped_total — rate/s

panels.description: Billing events handed to the Snowplow tracker after a successful query.
panels.title: gkg_billing_events_emitted_total — rate/s

panels.description: Billing events refused by the labkit tracker at enqueue (queue full or tracker shutdown). HTTP delivery failures to the Snowplow collector occur in labkit's background loop and are not surfaced through this counter.
panels.title: gkg_billing_events_rejected_total — rate/s

panels.description: Requests that bypassed the quota gate because their source_type is not in the metered set (mcp/rest), labelled by source_type.
panels.title: gkg_billing_quota_bypassed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Current number of entries in the per-pod quota decision cache. Approaches the QUOTA_MAX_CACHE_ENTRIES ceiling under sustained load from many distinct namespaces.
panels.title: gkg_billing_quota_cache_entries

panels.description: Latency of upstream CustomersDot HEAD requests for quota resolution. Recorded once per actual HTTP call; concurrent cache-miss coalescing means this count is lower than the decisions{cache=miss} counter under load.
panels.title: gkg_billing_quota_cdot_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.description: Latency of upstream CustomersDot HEAD requests for quota resolution. Recorded once per actual HTTP call; concurrent cache-miss coalescing means this count is lower than the decisions{cache=miss} counter under load.
panels.title: gkg_billing_quota_cdot_duration_seconds — observation rate

panels.description: Quota gate decisions, labelled by outcome (allow/deny/fail_open), cache result (hit/miss), and source_type (mcp/rest). cache=miss on fail_open does not imply a 1:1 CDot call ratio — see gkg.billing.quota.cdot.duration for actual upstream call counts.
panels.title: gkg_billing_quota_decisions_total — rate/s
